data.description:

data.title: XRP Price Enters Golden Pocket: Analyst Says It’s A Good Buy At These Levels
data.description:
The XRP price has entered a Golden Pocket—a key Fibonacci retracement level that often acts as strong support. According to a crypto analyst, this new development could present an attractive buying opportunity for investors, especially as the market consolidates. XRP Price Golden Support Could Trigger Rebound A crypto analyst, known as “ColdBloodedCharter’ on TradingView, has presented a...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-enters-golden-pocket/

data.title: Ex-Google Engineer Faces Espionage Charges Over Alleged AI Data Theft for China
data.description:
A former Google software engineer, Linwei (Leon) Ding, has been charged with economic espionage after allegedly stealing critical AI-related data, according to the U.S. Department of Justice.
The post Ex-Google Engineer Faces Espionage Charges Over Alleged AI Data Theft for China appeared first on Cryptodnes.
source: https://cryptodnes.bg/en/ex-google-engineer-faces-espionage-charges-over-alleged-ai-data-theft-for-china/

data.title: Bitcoin no longer a ‘fringe asset,’ says top Bitcoin mining exec
data.description:
Bitcoin is no longer a “fringe asset,” says Bitdeer exec, pointing to institutional adoption, growing liquidity, and mainstream accessibility through ETFs.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/innovation/bitcoin-no-longer-a-fringe-asset-says-top-bitcoin-mining-exec

data.title: MetaMask adds Gas Station feature for token-based transaction fees
data.description:
MetaMask has introduced a new feature allowing users to pay network fees using a selection of Ethereum-based tokens instead of ETH. The Gas Station feature, announced on Feb. 5, aims to enhance accessibility by removing the requirement to hold native blockchain assets for transaction fees. The update enables users to complete transactions using approved tokens, which […]
The post MetaMask adds...
source: https://cryptoslate.com/metamask-adds-gas-station-feature-for-token-based-transaction-fees/

data.title: FDIC Unseals 175 Documents Exposing US Banks Debanking of Crypto Firms
data.description:
The Federal Insurance Deposit Corporation (FDIC) is unsealing hundreds of documents that expose how US institutions were instructed to be deprived of crypto-related services. In a new press release, the FDIC – the government agency that insures deposits in US banks – says it is unveiling 175 documents revealing how it supervised banks that participated […]
The post FDIC Unseals 175 Documents...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/05/fdic-unseals-175-documents-exposing-us-banks-debanking-of-crypto-firms/

Researchers Flag Crypto Stealing Malware in Google and Apple Apps
